nodes.label: AI as diagnostic consultant for plant health
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable or unhelpful for plant health
nodes.grounding_span: AI is better at asking questions to pinpoint exactly what is happening and what I should do for the plant

nodes.label: AI as creative decorator for garden aesthetics
nodes.label_negative: Human creative vision for garden aesthetics
nodes.grounding_span: I haven't found AI's decorative abilities to be superior to mine quite yet, I value my own opinion more

nodes.label: AI as learning aid for novice gardeners
nodes.label_negative: AI as unnecessary for experienced gardeners
nodes.grounding_span: when I was first starting to learn how to garden I did not have much experience so asking AI these questions certainly made me think of factors I otherwise wouldn't

nodes.label: AI as second opinion for experienced gardeners
nodes.label_negative: AI as primary decision-maker for experienced gardeners
nodes.grounding_span: it just definitely helps to receive a second opinion

nodes.label: Plant health and survival
nodes.grounding_span: messing it up means the plant will likely be dead or too far gone to save

nodes.label: Personal creative fulfillment
nodes.grounding_span: I take pride in having a vision and then making that vision come to life

nodes.label: Skill development and expertise
nodes.grounding_span: I am even more certain that I will be able to maintain this skill and even potentially further my skill and expertise

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI diagnostic help
nodes.grounding_span: After I sliced this root off, the plant returned to draining and full health

nodes.label: Preference for human creativity over AI
nodes.grounding_span: I value my own opinion more

nodes.label: Confidence in maintaining skills with AI
nodes.grounding_span: I am even more certain that I will be able to maintain this skill

nodes.label: Systematic diagnostic questioning
nodes.grounding_span: AI will ask follow up questions

nodes.label: Consultation-based interaction pattern
nodes.grounding_span: I present the issue and symptoms, the AI eventually gives me an educated answer, and then I go ahead and implement
